name: Kargath Stoneclaw
sd_appearance: Orc, A jagged scar runs from his left eyebrow to his jawline, darkening the matted rust-red fur around his neck. His tusks are filed down to sharp points, and his eyes glow faintly amber in the dim light of the Black Market., wearing chain mail or scale mail, carrying warhammer, crossbow, rank-appropriate gear from leather to enchanted plate, Guild badge displayed
faction_visual: rank-appropriate gear from leather to enchanted plate, Guild badge displayed
style_note: worn leather and chainmail, equipment that tells a story of past contracts
